hero.eyebrow: B.Tech CSE · TIET Patiala · NTSE National Scholar
hero.sub: I build intelligent systems that learn, reason, and solve.
hero.body: Fourth-year CS student specializing in deep learning, computer vision, and LLM-powered systems. I don't just use AI — I direct it.

paragraphs: I grew up in Rupnagar, Punjab, in a house where the blackboard never really turned off — my father taught physics, and dinner-table questions came with free-body diagrams.

But the real curriculum was Saturday mornings. The cartoons everyone else watched for the explosions, I watched for the machines — the ones that thought, chose sides, protected people. Somewhere between a physics lesson and a transforming robot, a kid decided that machines could have a soul, and that somebody had to be the one to build it.

Then I found deep learning, and the fiction snapped into syllabus: a galaxy classifier is a machine learning to see; a multimodal Alzheimer's detector is a machine learning to care about what it sees. Every project since has been the same project — teaching silicon to perceive, reason, and matter.
They called it science fiction. I call it a syllabus.

sifarish.title: SIFARISH
sifarish.tagline: सिफ़ारिश — a job-hunt chief of staff. Compile truth. Draft everything. Send nothing.

spark-core.title: SPARK CORE
spark-core.tagline: This portfolio. It absorbs my repos, writes its own case studies, and updates without redeploys.

sehat-saarthi.title: Sehat Saarthi
sehat-saarthi.tagline: Punjabi-first clinical decision-support screening co-pilot (proof-of-concept, pending validation).

gloaming.title: Gloaming
gloaming.tagline: An atmospheric browser game, built end-to-end and live.

stellarrift.title: Stellarrift
stellarrift.tagline: Dark-matter subhalo gap detection in stellar streams via KDE density analysis.

voidseer.title: Voidseer
voidseer.tagline: Cosmic void shape statistics as a dark-energy equation-of-state probe.

galaxy-morphology-transfer.title: Galaxy Morphology Transfer
galaxy-morphology-transfer.tagline: Transfer learning on ResNet to classify spiral, elliptical, and irregular galaxies.

ledger.entry: SPARK CORE deployed � the portfolio now evolves itself
absorbed sifarish — case study compiled by Cortex
SPARK CORE comes online — this site begins evolving itself
Sehat Saarthi proof-of-concept enters the forge
Stellarrift + Voidseer — two dark-universe research probes committed
1st place — Gen AI Hackathon, IIT Ropar
AI Mentorship Program — Launched Global, in assoc. with IIT Kharagpur
National NTSE Scholar — top ~0.01% nationwide in Science & Mathematics

vision.manifesto: The best engineers of this era won't be the ones who memorize frameworks. They'll be the ones who can look at a hard problem, understand its structure, and direct intelligent systems to build what one person alone never could. That's the engineer I'm becoming — in public, one absorbed project at a time. This site is the proof: it watches my GitHub, writes its own case studies, and logs its own evolution. I don't update my portfolio. I update my work, and the portfolio keeps up.
